stream_samples.text: gpt-4.1 long-context (>120k) p95 TTFT crept up to 14.2s last week. our agent eval suite is timing out at 30s.
Realtime API cost drift: same 5-min voice session billing 38% higher this week vs last with identical inputs. no changelog mention.
[#14820 P1] Tool-use loop: model calls the same retrieval tool 11 times in a row before returning a response, eating tokens
Web search tool citing URLs that 404 — model is hallucinating the source attribution. seen on gpt-4.1 and o-series.
Streaming SSE drops connection at ~8k tokens on the chat completions endpoint. retry-with-resume isn't documented.
Image upload silently drops files >18MB on /v1/responses, returns 200 with the file ignored — no error, no warning, just bad output
p95 TTFT regression on gpt-4.1-128k traced to KV cache eviction policy change — confirmed via inference traces
anyone else seeing tool_calls stuck in a loop? my agent burned $4 calling get_weather 14 times before I killed it.
[alert] inference.ttft.p95 > 12s on gpt-4.1 long-context for 7h, breach #3 this week, region: us-east
Structured outputs schema enforcement breaks on nested oneOf with $ref since the 04/19 update. our pipeline rejects valid JSON now.
Batch API processing time on long-context jobs is 4x the documented SLA — 24h jobs hitting 96h+ for our customer
the o-series tool-use reasoning is genuinely a step-change for agent eval scores. quietly impressive.
is the new responses API the recommended path for new builds or should I still use chat completions?
Assistants API thread-list pagination returns duplicate threads at cursor boundaries on workspaces with >5k threads

top_epic.title: Recover gpt-4.1 long-context TTFT to under 6s on 128k inputs
top_epic.rationale: 3,120 signals across X, Slack Connect, Datadog and the developer forum point to the same regression: a KV cache eviction policy change has pushed long-context TTFT p95 from ~5s to 14.2s on gpt-4.1, breaching the inference SLO three times this week in us-east alone. Agent platforms running eval suites at 30s timeouts are silently failing — and those are the exact accounts driving Realtime API and Assistants growth.
top_epic.verdict: Revenue-critical — long-context latency is the #1 reason platform customers benchmark Anthropic and Google.
top_epic.recommendation: Revert the KV eviction change, ship a long-context TTFT SLO, and add an inference perf gate before any cache-policy PR ships.
acceptance_criteria: TTFT p95 < 6s on gpt-4.1 with 128k-token inputs across us-east, us-west, eu-west
KV cache hit-rate above 85% on long-context replay benchmark suite
Per-model TTFT SLO published with PagerDuty escalation at 8s breach
Inference CI gate fails any cache-policy PR that regresses TTFT p95 > 8%
